data_description.host: IP address of the OD-11 speaker (e.g. 192.168.1.42). The default od-11.local may not resolve on all networks.
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant.

confirm.title: OD-11 speaker found
confirm.description: Do you want to add **{name}** ({host}) to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the speaker. Check the IP address and make sure the speaker is on and connected to the network.
